title: Overtime vs. Hiring Breakeven Calculator
description: Industrial engineering tool to determine the breakeven point between using overtime and hiring additional full-time employees, incorporating labor costs, productivity, quality, and risk factors.

inputs.label: Current Headcount (FTEs)
inputs.businessContext: Number of full-time equivalent employees currently working in the department or line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of full-time equivalent employees currently working in the department or line.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Departman veya hatta şu anda çalışan tam zamanlı eşdeğer çalışan sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Vollzeitäquivalente, die derzeit in der Abteilung oder Linie arbeiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'équivalents temps plein travaillant actuellement dans le service ou la ligne.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de empleados equivalentes a tiempo completo que trabajan actualmente en el departamento o línea.

inputs.label: Average Hourly Wage (Base)
inputs.businessContext: Average base hourly wage for the role, excluding overtime premium.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average base hourly wage for the role, excluding overtime premium.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fazla mesai primi hariç, pozisyon için ortalama taban saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Basisstundenlohn für die Rolle, ohne Überstundenzuschlag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire de base moyen pour le poste, hors prime d'heures supplémentaires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario base promedio por hora para el puesto, excluyendo prima de horas extra.

inputs.label: Overtime Premium Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Standard overtime pay multiplier (e.g., 1.5 for time-and-a-half, 2.0 for double time).

label_i18n.es: Multiplicador de prima de horas extra

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard overtime pay multiplier (e.g., 1.5 for time-and-a-half, 2.0 for double time).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart fazla mesai ücret çarpanı (ör. 1.5 bir buçuk kat, 2.0 çift kat).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Überstundenvergütungsmultiplikator (z. B. 1,5 für Zeit und Hälfte, 2,0 für doppelte Zeit).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur standard de rémunération des heures supplémentaires (ex. 1,5 pour le tarif et demi, 2,0 pour le double tarif).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de pago de horas extra estándar (ej., 1.5 para tiempo y medio, 2.0 para tiempo doble).

inputs.label: Overtime Hours per Week (per FTE)
inputs.businessContext: Average overtime hours worked per full-time employee per week.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average overtime hours worked per full-time employee per week.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam zamanlı çalışan başına haftalık ortalama fazla mesai saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Überstunden pro Vollzeitmitarbeiter und Woche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen d'heures supplémentaires travaillées par employé à temps plein par semaine.
businessContext_i18n.es: Promedio de horas extra trabajadas por empleado a tiempo completo por semana.

inputs.label: Hiring Cost per FTE
inputs.businessContext: Total cost to recruit, interview, onboard, and train a new employee (including agency fees, training materials, lost productivity).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost to recruit, interview, onboard, and train a new employee (including agency fees, training materials, lost productivity).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeni bir çalışanı işe almak, mülakat yapmak, işe yerleştirmek ve eğitmek için toplam maliyet (ajan ücretleri, eğitim materyalleri, kayıp verimlilik dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtkosten für Rekrutierung, Vorstellungsgespräche, Einarbeitung und Schulung eines neuen Mitarbeiters (einschließlich Agenturgebühren, Schulungsmaterial, Produktivitätsverlust).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total pour recruter, interviewer, intégrer et former un nouvel employé (incluant frais d'agence, matériel de formation, perte de productivité).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total de reclutar, entrevistar, incorporar y capacitar a un nuevo empleado (incluyendo honorarios de agencia, materiales de capacitación, pérdida de productividad).

inputs.label: Annual Benefits Cost per FTE
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost of benefits (health insurance, retirement, paid leave, etc.) per full-time employee.

label_i18n.tr: Çalışan Başına Yıllık Yan Hak Maliyeti
label_i18n.fr: Coût annuel des avantages sociaux par ETP
label_i18n.es: Costo anual de beneficios por ETC

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual cost of benefits (health insurance, retirement, paid leave, etc.) per full-time employee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam zamanlı çalışan başına yıllık yan hak maliyeti (sağlık sigortası, emeklilik, ücretli izin vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Kosten für Zusatzleistungen (Krankenversicherung, Rente, bezahlter Urlaub usw.) pro Vollzeitmitarbeiter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel des avantages sociaux (assurance santé, retraite, congés payés, etc.) par employé à temps plein.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo anual de prestaciones (seguro médico, jubilación, licencia remunerada, etc.) por empleado a tiempo completo.

inputs.label: Overtime Productivity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Productivity during overtime as a percentage of normal shift productivity (e.g., 85% due to fatigue).

label_i18n.fr: Facteur de productivité en heures supplémentaires
label_i18n.es: Factor de productividad en horas extra

businessContext_i18n.en: Productivity during overtime as a percentage of normal shift productivity (e.g., 85% due to fatigue).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fazla mesai sırasındaki verimliliğin normal vardiya verimliliğine yüzdesi (örneğin, yorgunluk nedeniyle %85).
businessContext_i18n.de: Produktivität während Überstunden als Prozentsatz der normalen Schichtproduktivität (z. B. 85 % aufgrund von Ermüdung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Productivité pendant les heures supplémentaires en pourcentage de la productivité normale (ex. 85% en raison de la fatigue).
businessContext_i18n.es: Productividad durante horas extra como porcentaje de la productividad del turno normal (ej. 85% debido a fatiga).

inputs.label: New Hire Ramp-Up Productivity
inputs.businessContext: Average productivity of a new hire during the first 3 months as a percentage of an experienced employee.

label_i18n.tr: Yeni İşe Alınanın Verimliliğe Uyum Süresi
label_i18n.de: Produktivität neuer Mitarbeiter während der Einarbeitung
label_i18n.fr: Productivité de montée en charge des nouvelles recrues
label_i18n.es: Productividad de nuevo empleado en período de adaptación

businessContext_i18n.en: Average productivity of a new hire during the first 3 months as a percentage of an experienced employee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeni bir işe alınanın ilk 3 aydaki ortalama verimliliğinin deneyimli bir çalışana yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Produktivität eines neuen Mitarbeiters in den ersten 3 Monaten als Prozentsatz eines erfahrenen Mitarbeiters.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Productivité moyenne d'une nouvelle recrue au cours des 3 premiers mois en pourcentage d'un employé expérimenté.
businessContext_i18n.es: Productividad promedio de un nuevo empleado durante los primeros 3 meses como porcentaje de un empleado experimentado.

rules.message: Overtime hours must be greater than zero to calculate overtime scenario.
Current headcount must be at least 1.
Weekly productive hours needed must be greater than zero.
Risk multiplier must be >= 1.0 when risk adjustment is enabled.

thresholds.message: Overtime hours exceed 20/week per FTE – high risk of burnout and quality issues.
Breakeven hours negative – hiring is always cheaper than overtime under current parameters.
Defect costs in overtime scenario are more than 50% higher than hiring scenario – quality risk is significant.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
